data.current_description: Generic API endpoint. All ResourceSpace API functions are called via query parameters specifying the function name and its parameters.
data.summary_suggestion: Execute ResourceSpace API function via query parameters
data.description_suggestion: Executes a ResourceSpace API function by specifying the function name and parameters as query string arguments. The function name is passed via the 'function' parameter, with additional parameters as key-value pairs in the query string. Requires signature authentication via SHA256 hash of the private API key concatenated with query parameters. Returns the function result in the response body. This method is suitable for non-sensitive operations; use POST for sensitive data.
data.reasoning: Original summary is too generic and doesn't specify the mechanism (query parameters). Description lacks critical details about authentication requirements, parameter passing mechanism, return behavior, and when to use this vs POST. Added specifics about signature authentication, function parameter structure, and guidance for AI agents on method selection based on data sensitivity.

message: Operation 'callFunctionPost' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects, poor_ai_interpretability. Original summary lacks specificity about POST mechanism. Description is incomplete - it references 'same as GET' without explaining the actual differences, lacks authentication details, and doesn't clarify what constitutes the response. Enhanced version specifies POST body parameter passing, authentication requirements, return behavior, and use cases to help AI agents understand when to select this method over GET.

data.current_summary: Call an API function via POST
data.current_description: Same as GET but preferred for sensitive data. All parameters sent in request body.
data.summary_suggestion: Execute ResourceSpace API function via POST request body
data.description_suggestion: Executes a ResourceSpace API function by sending the function name and parameters in the POST request body. The function name is specified via the 'function' parameter, with additional parameters as key-value pairs in the request body. Requires signature authentication via SHA256 hash of the private API key concatenated with query parameters. Returns the function result in the response body. This method is preferred for operations involving sensitive data or large parameter payloads.
data.reasoning: Original summary lacks specificity about POST mechanism.
